message:
fix: saturating numkeys arithmetic, RAII oracle connections, and ZADD dedup

- fr-command: replace bare addition with saturating_add for all numkeys
  bound checks in ZUNIONSTORE, ZINTERSTORE, ZDIFF, ZDIFFSTORE, ZINTER,
  ZUNION, and ZINTERCARD to prevent usize overflow when a malicious client
  sends a numkeys value near usize::MAX; fix BITFIELD signed wrap overflow
  to use shift-based sign extension instead of the incorrect modulo+range
  approach that produced wrong results for negative values
- fr-conformance: wrap TcpStream in LiveOracleConnection with a Drop impl
  that calls shutdown(Both), ensuring the connection to the live Redis
  oracle is properly torn down even if the test panics or returns early
- fr-store: deduplicate ZADD members before insertion so that duplicate
  entries in a single ZADD command respect last-writer-wins semantics
  instead of double-counting the added/changed counters

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
